The '''''Reprisal''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Around half a year after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ship was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]], as the center of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] presence in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]], supported by a number of [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught Cruisers]] and smaller [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].<ref name="Allegiance" />

Under Ozzel's command, the ''Reprisal'' took part in a punitive mission against [[Teardrop]], and was subsequently assigned a [[tactical unit]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vak Somoril]], to further prosecute the war against Rebel factions in the sector. Following incidents that attracted the attention of both [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]],<ref name="Allegiance" /> it appears that Captain Ozzel was transferred to the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] in Vader's fleet, although the ''Reprisal'' also appears to have come under Vader's authority at about this time.

About eight months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ship was under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Demmings]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sankaran]], nominally assigned to a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], but under [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] direct authority during his attempts to locate the Rebel fleet and his son, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. It may have been the command ship of the local [[Sector Group/Legends|Sector Group]].

The ''Reprisal'' was at [[Tiss'sharl]] for a meeting where Vader introduced Demmings to the leaders of the [[Tiss'sharl League]] as their new liaison, when reports arrived that placed Skywalker on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. The ''Reprisal'' quickly left Tiss'sharl, and led a fleet to complete the brutal pacification of the rebellious planet. The Star Destroyer subsequently remained at Jabiim to supervise final stages of this operation, in the course of which a supply shuttle was stolen by [[Tal Hesz]].

Still serving as Vader's command ship, the ''Reprisal'' next conducted strikes against Rebel targets, including a scout team and a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], with the aim of capturing prisoners who might reveal the Rebels' location—but instead, turbolaser fire from the Star Destroyer destroyed the targets completely, leading Vader to question the ship's reputation and almost to execute Demmings.<ref name="Empire 35" />

[[File:Reprisal.jpg|thumb|left|The ''Reprisal'' over [[Ejolus]].]]

However, after a [[Destruction of the Ejolus outpost|third strike]], against a surface target in the [[Ejolus system/Legends|Ejolus system]], Vader revealed that gunnery officer [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Garil Dox]] was a Rebel agent and a native of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], hoping to undermine Demmings' reputation for loyalty and competence by botching these missions.<ref name="Empire 35" />

Vader revealed to Dox that the [[Ejolus]] colony had in fact been a settlement of pacifists from his homeworld. As the traitor was dragged away to the labor camps, Vader coldly remarked that his willingness to destroy innocent civilians in the hope of achieving his military goals suggested that he had possessed the potential to be a fine Imperial officer.<ref name="Empire 35" />
